title: Why does a face to face conversation with God cost us our life?

comments.author: joshualinog
comments.body:
Because Adam and Eve covered there nakedness and left yeshua and now that we are far away it is more of a cost because of what Adam and Eve did so now it's more of a hard thing to do like if you want to be far from me then you are more far and it's much more of a cost

- Torah
